summary: Pinterest Engine Phase 2 (12 batched improvements) + Google Shopping XML feed fully tested. 34/34 unit tests pass + 16/17 live API tests pass (1 cache-control failure is preview ingress override, NOT a code bug — backend correctly emits 'public, max-age=3600'). Frontend: 5 tabs on Pinterest Queue (Pin Queue/Performance/AI Renders/Boards Config/Blocked Images) all render; Google Shopping Merchant Center card on /admin/seo shows feed URL + 5-step setup; Marketing & Growth hub visible at top level of admin sidebar.

minor.issue: External Cache-Control header is overridden by preview ingress to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'. Backend correctly sets 'public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600' (verified via curl localhost:8001). Will work correctly in production once deployed behind proper CDN/ingress.

integration_issues.flow: Google Shopping feed health metric on /admin/seo
integration_issues.issue: Card shows '0 products ready for submission' and toast 'Feed returned 0 products — check filtering' in preview env. The displayed feed URL is the production URL (tilestation.co.uk/api/feeds/google-shopping.xml) so the test-fetch hits production which is empty. Live fetch of preview backend confirms 187 products in feed. Cosmetic for dev only — production will populate correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing unrelated banner: 'PRODUCTION OUTAGE ALERT — 5 endpoints reporting failures right now' is shown across admin pages. Not caused by Pinterest Phase 2 / Shopping Feed. Stale monitor data — verify which 5 endpoints if not already triaged.

Layout.js sidebar: clicking 'Marketing & Growth' hub label navigates to /admin/seo (hubLink) but does not expand inline children in the same panel. Hub structure is correct; children render via a separate expand interaction. Acceptable UX.

GoogleShoppingFeedCard frontend test-fetch uses the displayed (production) feed URL not the current REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — consider toggling to env-based URL in dev so '0 products' alarm doesn't confuse admin users in preview/staging.
routes/google_shopping_feed.py correctly sets Cache-Control + X-Product-Count headers. Verified via internal curl. External preview ingress overwrites Cache-Control — operational concern only.
seed_data_creation: None new. Existing 187 products already in DB drive the Shopping feed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pinterest Phase 2 (#1 perf loop, #2 Nano Banana lifestyle, #3 carousel slides, #4 idea pins prep, #5 seasonal weighting, #6 repin engine, #7 A/B copy variants, #8 dashboard tabs, #10 Google Shopping XML, #12 sidebar split into Communication + Marketing & Growth) is stable. Pinterest API not connected — sync_pin_performance/repin_run return graceful integration_not_connected. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY set; A/B variant + Nano Banana queue handlers run without raising. Live feed at /api/feeds/google-shopping.xml returns 217KB / 187 items / valid RSS-2.0 g: namespace XML. New scheduler jobs registered (perf 04:15, repin Mon 04:45, lifestyle every 3h). Sidebar: Marketing & Growth hub between Communication and Reports as required.
verified_endpoints: GET  /api/feeds/google-shopping.xml — 200, 187 items, valid RSS+g: namespace, X-Product-Count=187, https-only images, special chars escaped
verified_unit_test_coverage: seasonal_weight: Jan→bathroom, May→outdoor+garden+patio, Oct→kitchen, all 12 months have boosts, unknown=0
build_carousel_slides: 4 slides for full product, 4 slides for single-image fallback, no http:// leakage
sync_pin_performance: skips with integration_not_connected when no token
queue_lifestyle_render: skips without EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, skips without slug
_product_to_item_xml: happy path / missing essentials / out_of_stock / dict stock / xml escape / http-filter / title cap=150 / additional_image_link cap=9
verified_ui: /admin/pinterest-queue: 5 tab buttons render — Pin Queue, Performance, AI Renders, Boards Config, Blocked Images
Performance tab: 'Sync from Pinterest' button + 'repin scheduler' button present; empty state copy shown
AI Renders tab: 'Run batch (3 renders)' button + Tier-2 fallback explanation + 'No lifestyle renders yet' empty state
/admin/seo: Google Shopping Merchant Center card shows feed URL https://tilestation.co.uk/api/feeds/google-shopping.xml + 5-step setup + Open Merchant Center link
Sidebar: Marketing & Growth hub visible at top level between Communication and Reports
